; PgBouncer userlist — REFERENCE TEMPLATE, NOT MOUNTED.
;
; The compose service `v3-pgbouncer` lets the edoburu image auto-generate
; this file from DATABASE_URL + AUTH_TYPE=scram-sha-256 at container start,
; so a custom POSTGRES_PASSWORD in .env Just Works. This template is kept
; only for operators who want to override the auto-generated file with a
; hand-curated list of users.
;
; Format: "username" "password"
; - password may be plain text (must match AUTH_TYPE)
; - or a SCRAM-SHA-256 / md5 hash (matching AUTH_TYPE)
;
; To activate, re-add the bind mount in docker-compose.yml:
;   - ./config/pgbouncer/userlist.txt:/etc/pgbouncer/userlist.txt:ro
;
"postgres" "postgres"
